metric_ownership._doc: ODEs handle for continuous evolution; other metrics belong to rule_engine actions/auto_effects
ODE handles continuous market dynamics; rule_engine handles discrete competitive actions
ODE handles gradual political/econ drift; rule_engine handles discrete campaign/legislate/reform actions
ODE handles population/resources/pollution/biodiversity continuous evolution; rule_engine handles discrete actions
ODE handles population/finance gradual trends; rule_engine handles discrete build/industry/welfare actions
ODE handles tech_lead/talent_pool gradual trends; rule_engine handles discrete R&D/talent/standard actions
ODE handles trust/polarization gradual drift; rule_engine handles discrete propaganda/leak/framing actions
ODE handles cross-domain gradual metrics; rule_engine handles discrete military/economic/diplomatic/tech/propaganda actions
